name: Translator
description: High-quality translation with context preservation and cultural adaptation
author: Yuna Cheng

inputs.name: target_language
inputs.description: Target language code (e.g., en, zh, ja, ko, fr, de)

inputs.name: glossary
inputs.description: Custom glossary in 'source:target' format, one per line

inputs.name: style
inputs.description: Translation style: formal, casual, technical (default: match source)

outputs.name: translation
outputs.description: The translated text with optional notes on terminology and cultural adaptations
